description:
Analyze messy sleep tracking data to identify patterns and correlations between sleep quality and factors such as caffeine, screen time, and exercise. Determine the optimal bedtime using formulas and conditional formatting. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/sleep_analysis.xlsx.

    *   Wait, I'll make sure I don't use "First", "Then", etc.
    *   "Analyze... Determine... Save..." - these are imperative verbs starting sentences. This is fine.

    *   One more look at the original: "Analyze messy sleep tracking data to identify patterns, calculate correlations between sleep quality and factors (caffeine, screen time, exercise), and determine optimal bedtime using formulas and conditional formatting."
    *   The original is actually very close to being perfect. The main thing missing

natural_language.prompt: You have messy sleep tracking data with inconsistent time formats. Calculate sleep duration, categorize quality, apply conditional formatting, and use statistical formulas to identify which factors (caffeine, screen time, exercise) correlate with better sleep. Determine the optimal bedtime window.
